masthead.tagline: The morning edition, assembled without its editor.

lead.headline: Clear cut to punish DeChambeau - R&A boss
lead.blurb: The two-shot penalty given to Bryson DeChambeau at the Open is a "clear-cut decision" and Donald Trump has not called the R&A, says CEO Mark Darbon.

Pro and Team Standard users will continue to have access to Fable via usage credits, and will receive a one-time $100 credit. secondaries.headline: Max Muncy hits 2-run homer off Gerrit Cole in 7th to lift Dodgers over Yankees 2-1 in series opener
secondaries.blurb: — Max Muncy hit a two-run homer in the seventh inning on Gerrit Cole's 103rd and final pitch, lifting the Los Angeles Dodgers over the New York Yankees 2-1 on Friday night in their first game in the Bronx since winning the 2024 World Series.

stories.headline: nascheme/quixote
stories.blurb: nascheme/quixote A certain vintage if Python web nerd might be delighted to learn that the most recent commit to the Quixote web framework was six hours ago . The oldest commit in that repo is from 21 years ago, and that was the initial import of Quixote 2.4 from Subversion into Git. Tags: computer-history , python , web-frameworks

stories.blurb: 57 points, 66 comments on Hacker News

stories.blurb: Is there something I can actually help you with today? — Kimi K3 , after refusing to leak its system prompt Tags: kimi , ai-personality , generative-ai , ai , llms

stories.headline: LLM cliché highlighter
stories.blurb: Tool: LLM cliché highlighter I got frustrated reading yet another article that was crammed with the clichés of LLM-generated writing - "no fluff, no filler, no jargon" type stuff - so I had Fable 5 vibe code up this app for highlighting ten common patterns that show up in that sort of writing. Tags: tools , ai , generative-ai , llms

stories.headline: A scorecard for the AI age
stories.blurb: Sarah Friar, CFO of OpenAI, introduces a practical AI scorecard to measure ROI through useful work, cost per successful task, dependability, and return on compute.

stories.headline: Spot birds not golf
stories.blurb: Suggestion for hyperscalers feeling pressure over data center water use: Buy up a few exclusive country clubs, convert the golf courses into public parks, pay for guides and binoculars to get the previous members into birdwatching - help them embrace a more sustainable hobby! Google used 10.9 billion gallons in 2025 , so about 30 million gallons per day. The Coachella Valley has 120 golf courses e

stories.headline: Opinion: The continued courage of Captain Sully
stories.blurb: Retired pilot Chesley "Sully" Sullenberger is known for safely landing an airplane on the Hudson River in 2009. This week, he announced that he has Alzheimer's disease.

stories.headline: Burnham to announce plans for new North Sea oil and gas drilling
stories.blurb: Drilling has become a controversial topic for the Labour party after the 2024 manifesto pledged to not issue new licences.

stories.headline: Russian online retail warehouses hit by deadly Ukrainian strikes
stories.blurb: Drones targeted Wildberries facilities near Moscow and in Tambov. Ukraine's leader called them "major logistics facilities" supplying "sanctioned components".

stories.headline: US strikes hit Iran for seventh consecutive night
stories.blurb: Iran has retaliated against US allies in the region, with Kuwait reporting that a power and water plant had been hit.

stories.headline: Laos says it can't determine cause of tourist deaths linked to methanol
stories.blurb: Officials say they have no evidence of poisoning over the 2024 deaths because autopsies were not conducted.

stories.headline: 8 killed and more than 60 wounded in Ukrainian drone attack on Russian regions
stories.blurb: Kyiv's forces are continuing their aerial campaign against energy infrastructure and military targets inside Russia, aiming to undermine Moscow's war effort.

stories.headline: World Cup winner Capdevila appeals to Trump after US travel permit denied
stories.blurb: Former Spain international Joan Capdevila has made a plea to US President Donald Trump for help after he says he was denied a travel permit to enter the United States before Sunday's World Cup final.

stories.headline: 'Corny On The Bob' A Rising TikTok Meme Thanks To This TikToker's Excellent Meal Showcase Videos
stories.blurb: Corny On the Bob refers to a series of memes and video edits of TikToker Patty Miller (@pattyzapfemiller) calling corn and corn on the cob "corny on the bob" while showing off what she's eating for her meals. Videos of Patty calling corn on the cob "corny on the bob," and calling corn off the cob "corny off the bob," date back as early as May 2025. Clips of her using the term were popularized as t

stories.headline: For Over A Decade, This 'Billy Madison' Scene Has Been A Popular Reaction Meme For Adults Who Love Kids' Movies
stories.blurb: Adam Sandler Sitting With Kids or Billy Madison Sitting In First Grade Classroom is a reaction image and exploitable image macro meme format based on a scene from the 1995 Adam Sandler film Billy Madison where Billy Madison sits in his first-grade classroom for story time, surrounded by his classmates, children. The image was first used as a reaction meme as early as 2014 and became increasingly p

stories.headline: First Person POV 'Perfect Bleed Out Spot' Trend Being Called Out As Performative With Retaliatory Memes
stories.blurb: 10/10 Bleed Out Spot is a meme trend derived from the "masculine urge to bleed out here" memes where people share their perfect spots to bleed out and die under the caption, "10/10 bleed out spot." A perfect bleed out spot is often suggested to be a place where it would be aesthetically pleasing, poetic and peaceful to bleed to death, with many 10/10 bleed out spots featuring snow. The trend began

stories.headline: Restaurant's Using AI Food Images Sparks Viral Debate On Twitter
stories.blurb: AI Restaurant Food Images or AI Food Images Debate refers to viral online discourse and debates surrounding restaurants' (or other food-related businesses') use of AI-generated food images in menus, storefront signage, social media posts and delivery app listings. As generative AI image tools became more accessible in the mid-2020s, restaurants increasingly began using artificial intelligence imag

stories.headline: Kai Cenat And IShowSpeed's 'Ronaldo Pasta' Clip Is The Latest Brainrot Meme, Courtesy Of MrBeast
stories.blurb: Ronaldo Pasta is a series of memes based on a clip from a MrBeast video where streamer Kai Cenat serves streamer IShowSpeed a plate of "Ronaldo Pasta," a pasta dish inspired by IShowSpeed's favorite football player, Cristiano Ronaldo.
